metadata.title: DataLuminary — Insights Within Reach | AI-Native Open-Source BI Platform
metadata.description: DataLuminary is an open-source, plugin-based, AI-native data visualization and BI platform built with full-stack TypeScript. End-to-end AI insights, microkernel plugin ecosystem, drag-and-drop NoCode configuration, and 5-minute Docker private deployment.

openGraph.title: DataLuminary — Insights Within Reach
openGraph.description: AI-native, plugin-based, open-source data visualization BI platform

hero.badge: LuminaryWorks AI Ecosystem · Open Source Polyform Noncommercial License
hero.title: Insights Within Reach
values: End-to-end AI — report generation, charting, data cleansing, and page layout, AI assists every step
Microkernel plugins — data sources, charts, and dashboard layouts, everything is extensible
Full-stack TypeScript — launch with Docker in 5 minutes, private deployment, zero barrier to customization

card.aiGenerating: AI is generating an analysis report
card.anomalyAlert: 3 anomaly trends detected · East China Q3 YoY ↓18%

coreAdvantages.title: Redefining Enterprise Data Visualization
coreAdvantages.subtitle: End-to-end AI · Microkernel Plugins · Drag-and-Drop NoCode · Full-Stack TypeScript

cards.headline: AI-Native, End-to-End Intelligence
cards.body: Beyond visualization BI — DataLuminary embeds AI across every step from data to decisions. AI guides you through every stage of your reports.

chips.label: AI-Generated Analysis Reports
chips.desc: Describe your analysis goal; AI produces a complete report

chips.label: AI-Assisted Charting
chips.desc: Smart chart recommendations with automatic field mapping

chips.label: AI Data Cleansing
chips.desc: Detect nulls, anomalies, and format errors — fix with one click

chips.label: AI Page Layout
chips.desc: Analyze content hierarchy and auto-arrange dashboard layouts

cards.headline: Microkernel Architecture, Infinitely Extensible
cards.body: Panel, chart, and data source plugin systems form DataLuminary's visualization world — not a fixed feature list, but an ever-growing plugin ecosystem.

chips.label: Dashboard Plugins
chips.desc: Free-form big screens / PC grid reports / mobile lists / card boards

chips.label: Chart Plugins
chips.desc: ECharts · AntV · Highcharts — community contributions stack infinitely

chips.label: Data Source Plugins
chips.desc: MySQL / PG / MongoDB / Excel / API — extend via custom SDK

chips.label: Open SDK
chips.desc: JSON Schema constraints, interoperable with the Grafana ecosystem

cards.headline: Drag-and-Drop Configuration, No Coding Required
cards.body: Product, operations, and BI analysts can independently handle data cleansing, charting, and dashboard building. Developers can dive into SQL and advanced config when needed.

chips.label: Drag-and-Drop Datasets
chips.desc: Drag fields to configure metrics/dimensions, multi-table joins, calculated fields

chips.label: NoCode Charting
chips.desc: Pick chart type, drag fields to axes, live preview, zero code

chips.label: Visual Layout
chips.desc: Grid drag / free positioning, responsive adaptation

chips.label: Chart Linkage & Drill-Down
chips.desc: Visually configure filters and linkage — no interaction code

cards.headline: Full-Stack TS, Lightweight & Fast
cards.body: In the AI era, TypeScript is a first-class citizen. A unified full-stack means lower hiring barriers, faster AI-assisted development, and lighter maintenance.

chips.label: Live in 5 Minutes
chips.desc: One-click Docker Compose launch — deploy in 3 commands

chips.label: Easier Hiring
chips.desc: Thriving TS ecosystem — frontend and backend talent interchangeable

chips.label: AI-Assisted Development
chips.desc: TS type information is the language LLMs understand best

aiCapabilities.title: AI-Powered — Data That Speaks
aiCapabilities.subtitle: From data cleansing to insight reports, AI spans every step

report.tag: Auto-extract key metrics · Detect anomaly trends · Output business recommendations
report.user: Analyze regional sales trends this quarter, focusing on the East China decline
report.ai:
Analyzing Q3 sales dataset... Found 3 anomaly trends ↓
Report structure: Overview → Regional comparison → Root cause → Recommendations
report.anomalyNote: East China Q3 YoY ↓18%, mainly due to channel inventory backlog

chart.tag: Understand business semantics · Recommend best charts · Auto-complete configuration
chart.user: Compare monthly growth rates across product lines over the last 6 months
chart.ai: Auto-selected multi-series line chart, X-axis=month / Y-axis=growth rate, recommended color scheme, suggested mean reference line

clean.tag: Smart quality detection · Batch repair · Preserve processing history

layout.tag: Analyze content weight · Auto-adjust size and position · Follow visual standards
layout.afterNote: AI analyzed content weight of 6 components and auto-optimized layout hierarchy

pluginArchitecture.title: Meet Every Visualization Need
pluginArchitecture.subtitle: Unlike monolithic traditional BI tools, DataLuminary is a microkernel plugin platform — panel, chart, and data source plugin ecosystems make every visualization need achievable

lines: grid-panel grid layout — react-grid-layout, PC reports preferred, import Grafana panels
position-panel free-form big screen — TMagic-based, pixel-level positioning for command centers
card-panel card view — reports, email, boards, and more
list-panel list layout — mobile-first, vertical card scrolling
+ Custom layout plugins — integrate via development SDK

detail.title: Headless BI Design
lines: Chart plugins only render — data is uniformly supplied by the dataset layer, no direct data source connection
Built-in: line · bar · area · pie · ring · scatter · radar · funnel
Map · word cloud · metric card · table · rich text · liquid · heatmap · sankey · candlestick · graph...
Switch chart libraries: ECharts / AntV / Highcharts — swap freely without affecting configuration

detail.title: Three-Stage Plugin Protocol (Grafana-inspired)
lines: ConfigPanel data source config · QueryPanel query config · VariablePanel variable query
Relational: MySQL · PostgreSQL · SQL Server · ClickHouse
Document: MongoDB · Elasticsearch | Files: Excel · CSV · JSON
APIs: RESTful API · GraphQL | + Plugin SDK for any custom data source

dataPipeline.title: From Data to Decisions
dataPipeline.subtitle: Data Source → Dataset → Chart → Dashboard — data flows through the pipeline, every stage is plugin-extensible
dataPipeline.headlessNote: Charts do not connect directly to data sources — datasets supply data uniformly. This is DataLuminary's core architectural difference from traditional tools.

steps.label: Chart
steps.desc: NoCode charting, drag and get results

steps.label: Dashboard
popup: Grid / Position / Card / List — four layouts

team.title: Core Team: Years of Enterprise Data Visualization Platform Experience
team.subtitle: From Tencent to Ping An — deep expertise in enterprise BI and visualization platforms
team.quote: Having built enterprise BI platforms from 0 to 1 over many years, DataLuminary distills that experience into one product

cards.impact: Covers data experience pipeline for all Tencent game products
Core visualization component of Tencent Cloud operations system
Financial-grade enterprise and government data visualization platform
Commercial BI product with deep data visualization expertise

typescriptDeploy.title: Full-Stack TS, Lightweight Launch
typescriptDeploy.subtitle: In the AI era, TypeScript is a first-class citizen — unified stack, faster development, lighter deployment

reasons.title: The Top Choice for the AI Era
reasons.body: TypeScript is the language Copilot, Claude, and other AI tools understand best. Full-stack TS multiplies AI-assisted development — more accurate completions, safer refactors.

reasons.title: Lower Team Hiring Costs
reasons.body: Unified frontend/backend stack — full-stack engineers can ship complete features independently. Rich TS talent pool dramatically lowers team expansion barriers.

reasons.title: Type Safety, Fearless Refactoring
reasons.body: Strong typing spans frontend and backend — plugin interfaces and data contracts are type-guaranteed. Errors surface at compile time, not in production.

reasons.title: Lightweight Deployment, Simple Ops
reasons.body: One-click Docker Compose launch, PostgreSQL only. Skip Docker and use local DB. Full support for Windows / macOS / Linux.

compareBad: Complex installation, dozens of config items
typescriptDeploy.compareGood: DataLuminary: 3 commands · unified TS · automated bootstrap

openSource.title: Building the AI Data Insight Ecosystem Together
openSource.subtitle: DataLuminary is plugin-based — the entire platform is fully open to the community. Data sources, chart libraries, layout engines — extend capabilities at any layer

layers.headline: Data Source Plugin Layer
layers.sub: Direct connection at small scale, ClickHouse integration for billion-row data
points: Core data capabilities: MySQL · PostgreSQL · MongoDB · Excel · CSV · API
Small scale (millions) → direct PostgreSQL, zero extra cost
Tens/hundreds of millions → ClickHouse integration, second-level aggregation, config unchanged
Users choose their own foundation — no forced database binding
Three-stage plugin protocol, interoperable with Grafana data source ecosystem

layers.headline: Chart Plugin Layer
layers.sub: No chart library limits, semantic smart recommendations
points: Built-in (AntV G2): line · bar · pie · scatter · radar · sankey...
Semantic recommendations (Alibaba AVA): data decides the chart, not user guesswork
Headless BI: switch ECharts / AntV / Highcharts freely without affecting config
Any third-party chart library can be wrapped as a chart plugin

layers.headline: Panel Layout Plugin Layer
layers.sub: Multi-scenario layouts for every display need
points: grid-panel → grid drag, PC analysis reports preferred, import Grafana panels
position-panel → pixel-level free positioning (TMagic), big screens/command centers
card-panel → card view for reports, email, info boards
Layout engine itself is a plugin — build and integrate your own engine

featureCards.title: Lerna Package Management
featureCards.body: All plugins, components, and functions managed by Lerna — independent versions, releases, and imports

featureCards.title: Functional Data Processing
featureCards.body: Cleansing, transformation, and aggregation logic as pure functions — composable, testable, reusable

featureCards.title: Serverless-Ready Granularity
featureCards.body: Core processing logic is stateless — deploy directly as Serverless / Edge functions, compute on demand

featureCards.title: User-Chosen Foundation
featureCards.body: No forced database binding — direct PG at small scale, ClickHouse for billion-row data
